Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 061 [recipes][via cams/gkab]

flake
flake 1flake 1

⸢na₄⸣AN.ZAḪ na₄mu-ṣa na₄ZU₂ GE₆ na₄ḫu-luḫ-[ḫu ...]

anzahhu-stone, mūṣu-stone, black flint, huluhhu-stone [...],

flake 22

⸢na₄⸣AN.BAR na₄BABBAR.DILI na₄BABBAR.MIN₅ na₄GUG na₄ZA.GIN₃ x [...]

parzillu-stone, agate, papparmīnu-stone, carnelian, lapis lazuli ... [...],

flake 33

na₄PA na₄NI.BU na₄MUŠ.GIR₂ na₄zi-bit na₄zib-tu₄ [...]

white coral, yānibu-stone, serpentine, zibītu-stone, zibtu-stone, [...]

flake 44

17 NA₄-MEŠ * NA ŠU-su i-ra-ʾu-ub SIG₂ BABBAR SIG₂ x [...]

17 stones. (If) a person's hand tremble, white wool, ... wool [...]

flake 55

ina ŠU-šu₂ ⸢KEŠ₂⸣ [...]1

you bind on his hand [...]

flake 66

⸢na₄⸣mu-ṣa ⸢na₄⸣AN.ZAḪ NA₄ MIN BABBAR ⸢na₄⸣AN.BAR ⸢na₄⸣KURnu.⸢DAB⸣

muṣa-stone, anzahhu-stone, the same stone (but) white, parzillu-stone, magnetic,

flake 77

⸢na₄⸣ŠU.U NITA₂ u MUNUS ⸢na₄⸣aba-aš-mu na₄BAR?.⸢DU₃?⸣.[E? ...]

male and female šû-stone, abašmû-stone, whetstone [...]

flake 88

⸢na₄⸣NIR₂ ⸢na₄⸣BABBAR.DILI ⸢na₄⸣zib-tu₄ [...]

chalchedony, agate, zibtu-stone [...].

flake 99

* NA ŠU-MIN-šu₂ i-ra-ʾu-[u₂-ba ...]

(If) a person's hands tremble [...]

flake 1010

1niš NU.NU E₃⸢ak?⸣ [...]

(and then) you plait (them) together (and) thread (them on string) ... [...]

flake 1111

[(x)] x ŠAK KAL x [...]

[...] ... [...]

(end surface missing)
